skills.name: Capture Master
skills.description: High chance of increased capture rewards. (No effect when joining mid-quest.)

levels.description: High chance of increased capture rewards. (No effect when joining mid-quest.)

skills.name: Marathon Runner
skills.description: Slows down stamina depletion for actions which continuously drain stamina (such as dashing).

skills.name: Divine Blessing
skills.description: Has a predetermined chance of reducing the damage you take.

levels.description: While active, reduces damage taken by 15%.
While active, reduces damage taken by 30%.
While active, reduces damage taken by 50%.
While active, reduces damage taken by 60%.
While active, reduces damage taken by 60%. Skill becomes easier to activate as well.

skills.name: Blight Resistance
skills.description: Grants protection against all elemental blights.

levels.description: Reduces the duration of all elemental blights by 50%.
Reduces the duration of all elemental blights by 75%.

skills.name: Thunder Attack
skills.description: Increases thunder element attack power. (Elemental attack power has a maximum limit.)

skills.name: Thunder Resistance
skills.description: Increases thunder resistance. Also improves defense at higher levels.

skills.name: Free Elem/Ammo Up
skills.description: Unlocks your weapon's hidden element. Also increases bowgun loading capacity. (There is a cap to loading capacity.)

levels.description: Draws out 33% of hidden element and expands clip size for some ammo.
Draws out 66% of hidden element and expands clip size for many ammo.
Draws out 100% of hidden element and expands clip size for most ammo.
